page: Microsoft Azure D4ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical Intel Xeon 6973P-C cores running at 4.2 GHz, with hyper-threading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with a 236 GB local disk and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. No GPU accelerators are included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks reveal strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 25% and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reaching top-tier status in the top 10%. However, multi-core scaling is a notable tradeoff, as stress-ng multi-core performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression fall into the bottom 25%. Memory performance is mixed, showing average read bandwidths but weak large-block write bandwidth. Database operations and static web serving throughput register in the average tier.

Given its balanced resource allocation and high single-core speed, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that do not heavily parallelize but require quick execution of single-threaded tasks. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, lightweight database operations, static web serving, and basic file compression tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D4ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance includes a 236 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks GPU acceleration. Benchmark data highlights strong single-core performance, with single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reaching the top 10%, while multi-core scaling and large-block memory write speeds represent performance tradeoffs. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, and single-threaded processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, and a 236 GB local disk, delivering strong single-core performance for balanced workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D4ds_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 4 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 236 GB local storage, optimized for single-core workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring strong single-core Intel Xeon performance and integrated local storage for standard enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory and a 236 GB local disk
Delivers top-tier single-threaded compression and decompression speeds
Features advanced vector and matrix extension flags for specialized instruction sets
Suitable for general-purpose applications, static web serving, and database operations
